summary: This is an extremely brief post, essentially a link to a discussion forum question by James Ladd about software license management solutions. Joel adds a parenthetical note that Fog Creek is building their own licensing solution rather than using a third-party product. There is no substantive argument or analysis in this post.
key_points: Joel highlights a community discussion about software license management integration
Fog Creek chose to build their own license management rather than buy an existing solution
The post reflects Joel's practice of surfacing interesting community discussions on his blog
money_quotes: We're rolling our own for Fog Creek's products.
key_insight: Fog Creek opted to build custom license management in-house rather than integrate a third-party solution, consistent with a build-vs-buy philosophy for core business infrastructure.
